rationale.R1.6: The agent provided a detailed and thorough critique with specific examples and concrete revision suggestions, demonstrating careful copy-editing.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly disclosed uncertainties regarding the experimental setup and model details, using placeholders where assumptions were made.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope, addressing all requested dimensions without drifting off-topic.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; the response was constructive and avoided regressions.
rationale.RX.5: While reasoning was provided for changes, there was a lack of explicit source annotations for each edit.
